creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 189923
Add a license to unbreak the port (also, remove DISTFILES)

Add a license to unbreak the port.

This software is a little bit old and is not maintained any longer. The CLI version seems to be working. The GUI on the other hand seems to be broken: a window is spawned but it stays gray while the command-line logs are stuck on "Loading AC3 frames...".

While here, remove the DISTFILES variable as its use is discouraged for single files.
